content:
[Complete] Competitor Analysis Executive Summary is done!

PixelForge vs 5 Competitors:
1. Figma: Collaboration-focused but weak AI capabilities → PixelForge differentiator
2. Canva: Template-focused → PixelForge differentiates with AI custom generation
3. Adobe Express: Ecosystem strength → PixelForge competes on speed

Recommended action: Position AI generation customizability as the marketing anchor
Nova's competitor analysis executive summary is complete. Key differentiator: AI generation customizability. Sharing with CEO.

[Complete] E2E Test Results Report

All tests: 142/142 passed ✅
Coverage: 83.2%
Post-security-fix regression: None
Performance: API p95 = 147ms (threshold: under 200ms ✅)

Zero release blockers!

📊 v0.4 release decision criteria are met.

[Security] ✅ CRITICAL/HIGH: 0 issues
[Testing] ✅ 142/142 passed, coverage 83.2%
[Performance] ✅ p95 = 147ms
[Competitor Analysis] ✅ CEO summary complete
